summary: BOS/CHoCH SMC overlay testing on RELIANCE stock (1D and 1H timeframes). All 4 BOS/CHoCH color types verified via canvas pixel analysis. Full SMC feature regression passed. Toggle behavior correct. Build compiled cleanly.
critical_code_review_comments: computeSMCData returns bosChoch.slice(-20) — limited to last 20 events, sufficient for chart overlay
BOS label pill lx = xEv - tw - 4: label appears to the LEFT of the break point. Visually correct.

CHoCH arrow: bull arrow points DOWN (moveTo xEv,y+4 ... lineTo y+11) — this means for bullish CHoCH, arrow points down at break level. This is standard ICT convention (price broke above = downward arrow at old high level). Correct.
drawSMCCanvas uses rAF loop continuously — minor CPU impact when smcActive=true (same as previous iteration comment).
ChartPanel.jsx is now 1159 lines — well above 700-line recommendation. Consider splitting in a future phase.
context_for_next_testing_agent: BOS/CHoCH Layer 4 in drawSMCCanvas fully verified. Key test results: RELIANCE 1D — SMC canvas 1120x519px, 18371 drawn pixels. BOS bull (#00E676): 368px, BOS bear (#FF3B30): 4964px, CHoCH bull (#00BFFF): 550px, CHoCH bear (#FF6B00): 5182px. All 4 color types confirmed. All existing features (FVG+/FVG-, LH/LL, OB) regressed and working. SMC toggle (data-testid=smc-toggle) correctly shows/hides canvas. After 1H TF switch: 23131 drawn pixels, 1678 cyan CHoCH pixels. Build compiles cleanly.

tests_passed: smc-toggle found with data-testid='smc-toggle', text='SMC', title='SMC Auto Mark — FVG + Liquidity + Order Blocks'
SMC active by default (gold border F5A623 styling)
Total drawn pixels on SMC canvas: 18371 (FVG/OB/Swing/BOS/CHoCH all drawing)
CHoCH bull (#00BFFF cyan): 550 pixels confirmed — most distinctive BOS/CHoCH color
All SMC sections 4/4: FVG+(381px), FVG-(4964px), Swing/LH/LL(3566px), OB-bull(2394px)
SMC toggle OFF: canvas display=none, drawn_pixels=0 (canvas cleared)
Toolbar regression: gann-toggle, log-toggle, tf-1D, tf-1H all present
No visible JS error elements on page
After 1H timeframe change: 23131 drawn pixels, 1678 cyan CHoCH pixels still active
